extracted_information: CodePen PRO offers enhanced features for privacy, asset management, collaboration, and customization, available through various annual subscription plans.

items: Private by Default (start all Pens as private)
Secret URLs (un-guessable, non-searchable, non-indexable URLs for private content)
Full Ownership (Private Pens/Projects are unlicensed, allowing user's own licensing)
Easily Upload Files (drag-and-drop support for images, CSS, JavaScript, PDF, movie files, JSON, etc.)
Edit Images (optimize, change size, rotate directly in CodePen)
Easily Copy URLs (shortcuts for `![]()`, markdown, and CSS)
Collab Mode (real-time work on Pens with colleagues/friends, live preview, pair programming)
Professor Mode (students watch live work, interactive code, students can save forks)
Customized Profiles & Embed Themes (CodePen Embed Builder to customize look of Embedded Pens with unlimited themes and custom CSS)
Use your own domain for Projects (Developer and Super plans)
